name: agentic-loops
description: Standalone agentic loop templates, examples, and safety utilities.
author: Gregg Cochran <greggcochran@github.com>

scripts.check: node --check shared/loop.js && node --check shared/logger.js && node --check shared/state-store.js && node --check shared/approvals.js && node --check scripts/run-loop.js && node --check scripts/new-loop.js && node --check loops/hello-loop/loop.js && node --check loops/repo-health-check/loop.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run loop:hello && npm run loop:repo-health
